base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of weapons_menu_pause — a ui (menu_screen) from 1987 mega man. Pause-menu weapon-select — M/C/G/E/I/F/B cursor positions. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Pause-menu weapon-select — M/C/G/E/I/F/B cursor positions; on 1738×347 composite strip. Players press SELECT to switch weapon mid-stage
